title: RC4050 GST/HST Information for Selected Listed Financial Institutions - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4050 GST/HST Information for Selected Listed Financial Institutions
This guide explains the GST/HST reporting requirements for certain selected listed financial institutions and contains specific line-by-line instructions for filling out Forms GST494, GST34 and GST62.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format rc4050-e.html PDF rc4050-25e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This publication is also available for the years listed below: 2020 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-20e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-11e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-09e.pdf) 2007 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-07e.pdf)

### Read the publication
- Online format rc4050-e.html
This publication is also available for the years listed below:
- 2020 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-20e.pdf)
- 2011 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-11e.pdf)
- 2009 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-09e.pdf)
- 2007 – Standard print PDF (rc4050-07e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
